news.headline: South Korea to launch evening trading for treasury bond futures in June
Interparfums acquires fragrance and cosmetics brands from Off-White.
South Korea Plans to Issue Majority of Treasury Bonds in First Half of 2025
AI SRE tool Cleric boosts debugging efficiency and generalizes insights with LangSmith's tracing and feedback features.
news.summary: Cleric, an artificial intelligence Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) tool, utilizes LangSmith's tracing and feedback features to enhance debugging efficiency and apply insights across various deployments. This integration aims to streamline the debugging process and facilitate efficient problem-solving.

news.headline: Shares of MARA Holdings (NASDAQ: MARA) doubled in 3 months, reaching a market cap of $8.825B, with stock price rising from $13.37 to $25.63.
news.summary: Over the past three months, MARA Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:MARA) has experienced an impressive surge in market valuation, more than doubling its worth. This surge was primarily driven by the rise of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and the company's shift towards the Bitcoin "Standard." Closing at a 9-month high of $27.42 last Friday, MARA saw its market capitalization reach a record-breaking $8.825 billion. By Monday's close, the company was valued at $8.24 billion, marking an increase of $4.31 billion or 109% since September 6. Notably, the stock price rose significantly from $13.37 to $25.63 during this period. MARA's gains during this time outpaced those of other major miners like Riot.

news.headline: Nippon Steel responds to Trump's comments on US steel
Sichuan cuisine thrives in Xizang, reflecting bond between Han and Tibetans. Auth. blend in Southwest China.
news.summary: Today in Xizang Autonomous Region, located in Southwest China, one can savor authentic Sichuan cuisine, which has gained popularity among the locals. From the lively hotpot and self-service skewers available in downtown Lhasa to the more humble roadside eateries, Sichuan cuisine has seamlessly integrated into daily life in the region. This culinary influence highlights the rich food culture in Xizang, showcasing a diverse range of dishes that cater to the local population.

New technologies are revolutionizing human reproduction procedures, with soaring potential for advancements.
Podcast discusses UK financial system stability.

Trump's plan for U.S. national Bitcoin reserve gaining support, with proposal to purchase one million Bitcoins. Potential for significant market impact and establishing U.S. as leader in crypto. Other countries likely to follow suit if legislation passes.
news.summary: Following Donald Trump's call for a national Bitcoin stockpile, the idea of a U.S. strategic Bitcoin reserve has gained traction, especially with Sen. Cynthia Lummis proposing the BITCOIN Act to purchase one million Bitcoins over five years. This has garnered support from industry insiders and could position the U.S. as a leader in crypto. The move could significantly increase Bitcoin's value if implemented, with the potential for other countries to follow suit. This story is available on Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: Name Co. for medical supplies to transfer to main market
US lawmakers introduce bill to study #AI in financial services, housing; Rep. Maxine Waters highlights impact on mortgage lending and credit scoring.
news.summary: US Representative Maxine Waters recently highlighted the significant influence of artificial intelligence (AI) on mortgage lending and the calculation of credit scores. She introduced a new bill in Congress addressing this issue. The bill aims to address the changing landscape of loan approval processes due to AI, emphasizing the need for regulation and oversight. Waters expressed concerns about the potential implications of AI on credit scoring methods, highlighting the importance of ensuring fairness and transparency in lending practices. This legislation signifies a proactive approach to addressing the evolving role of technology in the financial sector.

news.headline: CUPE Ontario executive board supports CUPE 905 members on strike for job security and fair pay in Richmond Hill. Rally planned.
news.summary: In Richmond Hill, Ontario, members of CUPE Ontario's executive board will rally in support of striking workers from CUPE 905. The workers, responsible for managing parks, roads, water supply, and recreational facilities in Richmond Hill, began their labor dispute on November 22. The rally aims to show solidarity and demand stable employment conditions and fair wage hikes for the workers. The strike has significant impact as basic services are affected. The union's fight for job security and reasonable salary adjustments is crucial for the well-being of its members.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm investigating MNTX, ARCH, CYTH for potential securities violations and breaches on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: A legal firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, has commenced investigations into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties towards shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Manitex International, Inc. listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange. This investigation aims to determine if any violations or breaches have occurred that may affect shareholders.

news.headline: Feintool reorganizes electric motor parts production in Europe. Ad hoc LR announcement pursuant to Article 53.
news.summary: This announcement is issued in accordance with Article 53 of the Listing Rules (LR) of the SIX Exchange Regulation AG.

news.headline: Former Chief of Cyber for U.S. Army, Paul Craft, partners with DataShapes AI to address electronic warfare challenges.
news.summary: Paul Craft, the most experienced Chief of Cyber in the U.S. Army, has partnered with DataShapes AI in Charlottesville, Virginia, as of December 3, 2024. This collaboration aims to address intricate issues in electronic warfare and enhance data-driven decision-making. DataShapes AI, a top player in this sector, is joining forces with Craft to navigate the evolving landscape of cyber defense.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, investigates companies for potential securities violations, including Poseida Therapeutics Inc.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, announced they are scrutinizing several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. Among the companies being investigated is Poseida Therapeutics, Inc. listed on the NASDAQ. The investigation aims to uncover any violations that may have occurred, ensuring transparency and accountability within the market. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to stay updated on developments related to this matter.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm investigates ZUO, CDMO, BRKH for securities law violations. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is currently looking into potential breaches of fiduciary duties and violations of federal securities laws within several companies. One of the cases under investigation involves Zuora, Inc. (NYSE: ZUO), which is being scrutinized in relation to its sale to Silver. The investigation was announced on December 3, 2024, in New York. Specific numbers and details related to the investigation were not provided in the summary.

news.headline: Exxon considering selling $1B Singapore gas stations - report
Observers criticize US govt for selling Bitcoin, call it 'huge strategic mistake.' Space Force Major says it's senseless to sell any US-controlled Bitcoin at any price.
news.summary: Space Force Major Jason Lowery stated that the United States has no intention to sell any of the Bitcoin within its control, regardless of the price.

news.headline: Binance to remove multiple margin trading pairs, like BAND/BTC and GTC/BTC, on Dec 11, 2024, affecting cross and isolated margin accounts.
news.summary: Binance has revealed plans to remove a number of margin trading pairs, such as BAND/BTC and GTC/BTC, from their listings starting December 11, 2024. This decision will have repercussions on both cross and isolated margin accounts on the platform.

news.headline: Ivanti study shows phishing is a top cyber threat, driven by GenAI. Report explores challenges & benefits of generative AI in cybersecurity.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Ivanti, a tech company revolutionizing the integration of IT and security for seamless productivity, has published a new report titled "Generative AI and Cybersecurity: Risk and Reward". This report delves into the ways organizations are managing the intricacies of generative AI (GenAI) in cybersecurity, showcasing the potential benefits and obstacles it brings. GenAI serves as a robust resource for security teams in safeguarding organizations.

news.headline: Concurrent Utility Services acquires Atlantic Utility Constructors, Inc. to expand telecom offerings in Southeast. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Concurrent Utility Services, a reputable company in Sanford, Florida, disclosed their expertise in offering construction, installation, and maintenance services to mobile wireless operators, fiber providers, and electric power companies across the southeastern region. They have garnered recognition for their strategic approach in catering to the needs of these industries.

news.headline: Unum Group partners with Council for Disability Income Awareness, enhancing support for employers.
news.summary: A new member firm has been welcomed by the Council for Disability Income Awareness in Portland, Maine on December 3, 2024. This new addition is Unum Group, including its subsidiaries Unum and Colonial Life. Unum Group is renowned for providing employee benefits and HR solutions. Through Unum and Colonial Life, they offer services that help employers manage benefits effectively. This recent addition brings the total number of member firms in the Council to [number].

news.headline: Evolv acquires EnzoPay, expanding its payment solutions for 16,000+ businesses and processing $6B in transactions annually.
news.summary: Evolv, a prominent provider of payment acceptance solutions based in Newburgh, Indiana, revealed on December 3, 2024, that it has successfully acquired EnzoPay, a company located in Virginia. Evolv serves a vast clientele of more than 16,000 businesses and handles an impressive $6 billion worth of transactions annually. This acquisition is seen as a significant achievement for Evolv and sets the stage for further growth and expansion in the industry.

news.headline: Deloitte survey finds 9 in 10 workers disclosed a disability, with 25% experiencing challenges in workplace accessibility.
news.summary: Approximately 90% of individuals surveyed reported revealing their disability, chronic health issue, or neurodivergence at their workplace. The majority disclosed this information to either HR or their immediate supervisor. about 25% of those who disclosed their disability, neurodivergence, or health condition at work...

news.headline: Silicon Labs unveils new SiWx917Y Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth LE 5.4 modules for easy deployment.
news.summary: Silicon Labs, a tech company based in Austin, Texas, has introduced a new product, the SiWx917Y ultra-low power Wi-Fi® 6 module. This module is designed to provide plug-and-play simplicity and comes with global RF certifications. The company is known for its secure and intelligent wireless technology. The announcement was made on December 3, 2024. Silicon Labs is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol SLAB. This new module is expected to offer enhanced connectivity options for a more interconnected world.

news.headline: Caylent wins three 2024 AWS Partner of the Year Awards for Migration Consulting, GenAI, and Financial Services.
news.summary: Caylent has been honored with three prestigious awards: Migration Consulting Partner of the Year, Generative AI (GenAI) Industry Solution Partner of the Year, and Industry Partner of the Year - Financial Services. These accolades highlight Caylent's expertise and success in assisting clients worldwide in embracing innovation and growth. As part of the extensive network of AWS Partners, Caylent plays a vital role in guiding organizations through their tech transformation journey.

news.headline: Author and educator Idília Ramos releases "Saved by Love and Faith" in English and Portuguese, offering inspiration and spiritual insights.
news.summary: Author and educator Idília Ramos has unveiled a new autobiographical guide titled "Saved by Love and Faith," which provides readers with inspiration, spiritual insights, and travel reflections. The book offers content in both English and Portuguese, catering to a wider audience. The release was announced in Lagos, Portugal on December 3, 2024. This unique publication aims to connect with readers on a deeper level and share valuable experiences.

news.headline: New book "Conversations with Magdalene" by Claudia Bertotto explores 7 sacred paths for inner transformation. Published Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: Claudia Bertotto, an author, presents a new book that focuses on self-discovery, healing, and spiritual connection. The book titled "Conversations with Magdalene: Seeking the Path of the..." introduces readers to a transformative journey. This release marks Bertotto's comeback to the publishing world. The book is set to provide insights and guidance to readers seeking personal growth and enlightenment. The author's return brings a renewed sense of anticipation among readers, eagerly awaiting the wisdom contained in the pages.

news.headline: Idemitsu launches plant-based racing engine oil "IDEMITSU IFG Plantech Racing," available Dec. 3 online in Thailand, Australia, Singapore, and Malaysia.
news.summary: Idemitsu Kosan Co., Ltd., headquartered in Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo, is set to launch sales of its automotive engine oil, "IDEMITSU IFG Plantech Racing" in viscosity grade 0W-20. The product will be available in 4-litre and 1-litre options through the company's official online lubricants store starting from December 3. Customers in Thailand, Australia, Singapore, and Malaysia will have access to this product which is being touted as a global offering. The company's President, Shunichi Kito, leads this initiative.

news.headline: Recover™ opens new factory in Vietnam, pioneering recycling tech. Facility to be operational by early 2025.
news.summary: Recover™, a top producer of recycled cotton fiber and blends, recently revealed the launch of a new manufacturing plant in Vietnam, underscoring a key development in the company's worldwide growth strategy. The facility is scheduled to commence operations by early 2025. By introducing its innovative recycling technology, Recover™ seeks to promote extensive sustainability within the burgeoning textile sector in Vietnam. The plant is located in Dong Nai, aiming to enhance eco-friendly practices in the region.

news.headline: Australia applauds China's decision to lift suspensions on meat processors
2024 WCSL will start in Beijing, China from Dec 5 to 6, hosted by China Association for Science.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, the China Research Institute for Science Popularization announced that the 2024 World Conference on Science Literacy (WCSL) is scheduled to commence in Beijing, China on December 5-6. The event, organized by the China Association for Science, aims to promote global scientific awareness and education.

news.headline: MARA Holdings to offer $850M convertible notes to buy Bitcoin, mature in 2031. Funds will also repurchase existing notes.
news.summary: MARA Holdings, Inc. has announced a significant financial move with plans to offer $850 million in zero-coupon convertible senior notes that are expected to mature in 2031. The purpose of this offering is to fund the acquisition of Bitcoin as well as repurchase existing notes. This strategic decision indicates the company's intention to bolster its investment in digital assets and strengthen its financial position.

news.headline: New 'Write to Earn' campaign by Binance Square offers daily BNB rewards & up to 30% commission. Campaign runs Dec 3-9, 2024.
news.summary: Binance Square has launched a new initiative called the 'Write to Earn' campaign where content creators have the opportunity to receive daily BNB rewards and a commission of up to 30%. This campaign will be active from December 3 to December 9, 2024, providing creators with a chance to earn rewards through their content.

news.headline: Cronos (CRO) Mainnet to see major Pallene upgrade, boosting transaction processing with latest tech. Upgrade set for block 17,155,000.
news.summary: Cronos (CRO) Mainnet is preparing for the Pallene upgrade to improve transaction processing by incorporating the latest Cosmos SDK and CometBFT technologies. The upgrade is set to take place at block height 17,155,000.

news.headline: Tims China celebrates Timsgiving campaign spreading warmth by paying it forward during Thanksgiving week.
news.summary: In China, Tims coffee shops have experienced a surge of gratitude and celebration thanks to the first-ever "Timsgiving" campaign, occurring in the past week. The campaign has impacted multiple outlets nationwide, emphasizing the festive atmosphere and positive engagement within these establishments.

news.headline: Federal Reserve's Waller suggests December rate cut, expects inflation to drop to 2%. Policy remains restrictive.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller hinted at his inclination to back an interest rate reduction at the central bank’s upcoming December meeting. He highlighted concerns regarding recent inflation data surpassing the Fed’s 2% target. Waller made these remarks at the American Institute for Economic Research Monetary Conference in Washington, D.C., stating that monetary policy remains restrictive despite 75 basis points of cuts since September. He anticipates further rate cuts in the coming year to achieve a more neutral policy stance. Waller expressed his support for a rate cut in December based on current economic data and forecasts pointing towards inflation returning to 2% in the medium term.

news.headline: November saw crypto exchange volumes reach a 3-year peak, boosted by regulatory clarity and optimism post-Trump victory.
news.summary: Executives from cryptocurrency exchanges noted that a combination of increasing regulatory clarity and optimism following President-elect Donald Trump's election victory boosted trading activity significantly in November. As a result, trading volumes surged to noteworthy levels during this period.

news.headline: "Moo Deng" crypto, inspired by baby hippo, skyrockets 84% after Coinbase listing announcement. Trading volume increased 720% to $1.09B, market cap at $660M.
news.summary: A meme coin called "Moo Deng" saw a significant surge in value on Monday after being included in the listing roadmap of America's top cryptocurrency exchange, Coinbase. Moo Deng (MOODENG), which operates on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), experienced an impressive 84% price increase within the past 24 hours, as reported by CoinMarketCap. The coin's trading volume skyrocketed by 720% to $1.09 billion, with its market capitalization reaching a record high of $660 million. Despite a general decline in the meme coin market, MOODENG stood strong, unlike Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wasabi Technologies partners with SINET to offer hot cloud storage to universities via high-speed network.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Wasabi Technologies, a leading cloud storage company, revealed its partnership with SINET (Science Information NETwork) provided by the National Institute of Informatics. The collaboration allows for the integration of Wasabi's hot cloud storage services with SINET, offering universities and research institutions access to Wasabi's solutions through SINET's fast and secure closed network. This partnership opens up new opportunities for higher education and research communities to leverage Wasabi's cloud storage capabilities within SINET's framework.

news.headline: Renowned economist Peter Schiff questions lack of support in Congress for proposed legislation to set up a strategic Bitcoin reserve, with only 1 co-sponsor noted.
news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff questioned the government's proposal to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve due to lack of support in Congress. The legislation, introduced by Senator Cynthia Lummis and supported by Rep. Ro Khanna, has failed to attract any additional co-sponsors or significant attention from lawmakers. Schiff highlighted the disparity between the bill's popularity among the HODL community on social media platform X and its reception in Capitol Hill. The proposed "strategic" Bitcoin reserve bill has no co-sponsors besides Lummis and Khanna, raising doubts about its prospects in Congress. The development has sparked debate about the future of Bitcoin regulation and government involvement in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: DOGS token donates $4.5M unclaimed airdrops to charities & partners with Best Friends Animal Society in US.
news.summary: DOGS has recently announced a collaboration with Best Friends Animal Society, a renowned nonprofit organization committed to enhancing animal well-being in the United States. This partnership aims to strengthen support for vulnerable animals across the nation and has the potential to significantly impact countless lives. It is a commendable effort that signifies a step forward in addressing animal welfare issues, with the potential to make a lasting difference in the lives of numerous animals.
